sections.paragraph:
properly to cut, to divide, as in Ch. and Rabb. (cogn. to the roots which begin with קץ, קט, קש), hence to decree, to determine.

Niphal pass. Dan 9:24, “seventy weeks נֶחְתַּךְ עַל עַמְּךָ are determined (and shall come) upon thy people.” Theodor. and Gr. Venet. συνετμήθησαν, τέτμηνται. LXX. ἐκρίθησαν.
